[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 11000000 2

01 11100000 3
12 00000100 1
23 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
34 00111101 5
45 11000000 2 match 7
56 00100010 2
67 01010000 2
70 00001000 1

02 01100100 3
13 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
24 00010001 2
35 10011001 4
46 10000010 2
57 00100010 2
60 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
71 10001000 2
